name: deleteConditionalFormatting
description: Deletes one or more conditional formatting rules from a sheet by their index. Use getConditionalFormatting to list existing rules and their indices.

spreadsheetId.description: The spreadsheet ID — the long string between /d/ and /edit in a Google Sheets URL.

sheetName.description: Name of the sheet/tab. Defaults to the first sheet if not provided.

ruleIndices.description: Array of rule indices to delete (0-based, from getConditionalFormatting). Order does not matter — the tool sorts automatically.
